title: Murder
description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life and shall also be liable to fine.

title: Dowry Death
description: Where the death of a woman is caused by any burns or bodily injury within 7 years of marriage and dowry demand was made, the husband shall be punished.

title: Attempt to Murder
description: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge and under such circumstances that if he by that act caused death he would be guilty of murder.

title: Rape
description: Whoever commits rape shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment of not less than 10 years extendable to life imprisonment and fine.

title: Theft
description: Whoever commits theft shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to 3 years or with fine or with both.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or Fine or Both

title: Theft in Dwelling House
description: Whoever commits theft in any building, tent or vessel, which building tent or vessel is used as a human dwelling shall be punished.

title: Extortion
description: Whoever commits extortion shall be punished with imprisonment for up to 3 years or with fine or with both.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or Fine or Both

title: Robbery
description: Whoever commits robbery shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to 10 years and shall also be liable to fine.

title: Dacoity
description: Whoever commits dacoity shall be punished with imprisonment for life or with rigorous imprisonment for a term up to 10 years and fine.

title: Cheating
description: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property shall be punished with up to 7 years and fine.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust
description: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or Fine or Both

title: Criminal Breach of Trust by Public Servant
description: Criminal breach of trust by public servant or banker shall be punished with imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine.

title: Criminal Trespass
description: Whoever commits criminal trespass shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 months or fine up to 500 rupees or both.

title: House Trespass
description: Whoever commits house-trespass shall be punished with imprisonment for up to 1 year or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 1 Year or Fine or Both

title: Forgery
description: Whoever commits forgery shall be punished with imprisonment for up to 2 years or with fine or with both.
punishment: Up to 2 Years or Fine or Both

title: Forgery of Valuable Security
description: Forgery of valuable security or will shall be punished with imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine.

title: Husband Cruelty
description: Husband or relative subjecting woman to cruelty shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Assault on Woman
description: Assault or criminal force to woman with intent to outrage her modesty shall be punished with up to 5 years and fine.

title: Kidnapping
description: Whoever kidnaps any person from India or from lawful guardianship shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Kidnapping Woman to Compel Marriage
description: Kidnapping a woman to compel her marriage shall be punished with imprisonment up to 10 years and fine.

title: Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt
description: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means shall be punished with imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to 1000 rupees or both.
punishment: Up to 1 Year or 1000 Fine or Both

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Whoever commits criminal intimidation shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 2 Years or Fine or Both

title: Word or Gesture to Insult Woman
description: Word gesture or act intended to insult the modesty of a woman shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Rioting
description: Whoever is guilty of rioting shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 2 Years or Fine or Both

title: Promoting Enmity
description: Promoting enmity between different groups on grounds of religion shall be punished with up to 3 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or Fine or Both

title: Giving False Evidence
description: Giving false evidence shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Causing Disappearance of Evidence
description: Causing disappearance of evidence of offence or giving false information shall be punished.

title: Obscene Acts and Songs
description: Whoever does any obscene act in a public place to annoyance of others or sings obscene songs shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 Months or Fine or Both

title: Defamation
description: Whoever defames another shall be punished with simple imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 2 Years or Fine or Both

title: Computer Related Offences
description: Dishonestly or fraudulently doing any act referred to in section 43 shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 5 lakhs.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or 5 Lakh Fine

title: Sending Offensive Messages
description: Sending offensive messages through communication services shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine. (Struck down by SC)

title: Dishonestly Receiving Stolen Computer Resource
description: Dishonestly receiving stolen computer resource or communication device shall be punished with up to 3 years or fine or both.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or Fine or Both

title: Identity Theft
description: Fraudulently using electronic signature password or unique identification feature of another person shall be punished with up to 3 years and fine up to 1 lakh.
punishment: Up to 3 Years and 1 Lakh Fine

title: Cheating by Personation
description: Cheating by personation by using computer resource shall be punished with up to 3 years and fine up to 1 lakh.
punishment: Up to 3 Years and 1 Lakh Fine

title: Violation of Privacy
description: Intentionally capturing transmitting or publishing private area of any person without consent shall be punished with up to 3 years or fine up to 2 lakh.
punishment: Up to 3 Years or 2 Lakh Fine

title: Cyber Terrorism
description: Whoever commits cyber terrorism shall be punished with imprisonment for life.

title: Publishing Obscene Material
description: Publishing obscene material in electronic form shall be punished with up to 3 years and fine up to 5 lakh on first conviction.
punishment: Up to 3 Years and 5 Lakh Fine

title: Publishing Sexually Explicit Material
description: Publishing sexually explicit material in electronic form shall be punished with up to 5 years and fine up to 10 lakh.
punishment: Up to 5 Years and 10 Lakh Fine

title: Child Pornography
description: Publishing material depicting children in sexually explicit act shall be punished with up to 5 years and fine up to 10 lakh.
punishment: Up to 5 Years and 10 Lakh Fine

title: Definitions
description: Defines consumer defect deficiency unfair trade practice spurious goods service and other terms under the Act.

title: District Commission Jurisdiction
description: District Commission has jurisdiction where value of goods or services does not exceed 1 crore.

title: Filing Complaint
description: A consumer may file a complaint personally or through authorized agent or advocate.

title: Manner of Filing Complaint
description: Complaint shall be filed by paying prescribed fees with supporting documents and affidavit.

title: State Commission Jurisdiction
description: State Commission has jurisdiction where value exceeds 1 crore but does not exceed 10 crore.

title: National Commission Jurisdiction
description: National Commission has jurisdiction where value of goods or services exceeds 10 crore.

title: Divorce
description: Divorce may be granted on grounds of adultery cruelty desertion conversion mental disorder leprosy communicable disease or civil death.

title: Restitution of Conjugal Rights
description: Court may decree restitution of conjugal rights when either spouse without reasonable excuse withdraws from society of the other.

title: Maintenance Pendente Lite
description: Court may allow maintenance to either spouse during pendency of proceedings.

title: Permanent Alimony
description: Court may order payment of maintenance permanently or for specified period.

title: Custody of Children
description: Court may make provision for custody maintenance and education of minor children.

act_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act
title: Definition of Domestic Violence
description: Includes physical abuse sexual abuse verbal emotional abuse economic abuse against women in domestic relationships.

act_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act
title: Application for Relief
description: An aggrieved person or protection officer may file application before Magistrate.

act_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act
title: Right to Reside
description: Every woman in domestic relationship shall have right to reside in shared household.

title: Driving Under Influence of Alcohol or Drugs
description: Driving with alcohol content exceeding 30mg per 100ml of blood is an offence punishable with up to 6 months or 10000 fine.

title: Application for Compensation
description: Motor accident claims tribunal shall adjudicate claims for compensation on application by accident victims.

title: Requirements of Policies
description: Motor vehicles must be insured against third party risk before being used in public place.

title: Driving at Excessive Speed
description: Whoever drives at excessive speed on public roads shall be punished with fine up to 5000 rupees.

title: Part Performance
description: If a person contracts to transfer property for consideration and transferee takes possession then transferor cannot enforce contract against transferee.

title: Sale
description: Sale is a transfer of ownership in exchange for a price paid or promised or part paid and part promised.

title: Lease
description: A lease of immoveable property is a transfer of a right to enjoy such property for a certain time.

title: Documents Registration Compulsory
description: Documents relating to immovable property including sale lease gift mortgage above 100 rupees must be registered.

title: Conditions Precedent to Retrenchment
description: No workman employed for 1 year shall be retrenched unless given 1 month notice or pay in lieu of notice and retrenchment compensation.

title: Reference of Disputes
description: Government may refer industrial dispute to Board Labour Court Tribunal or Arbitrator.

title: Penalties
description: Employer not complying with scheme provisions shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to 4000 or both.

title: Penalties
description: Employer paying less than minimum wages shall be punished with imprisonment up to 6 months or fine up to 500 or both.

title: Payment of Gratuity
description: Every employee who has completed 5 years of continuous service shall be entitled to gratuity on termination of employment.

title: Request for Information
description: A person who desires to obtain information shall make request to Central or State Public Information Officer.

title: Public Servant Taking Gratification
description: Public servant accepting gratification other than legal remuneration shall be punished with imprisonment from 3 to 7 years and fine.

title: Punishment for Contravention of Manufactured Drugs
description: Whoever manufactures sells purchases possesses transports imports or exports manufactured drug in contravention of any provision shall be punished.

title: Punishment for Possession of Arms
description: Possession of arms or ammunition without licence shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both.

title: Offence of Money Laundering
description: Whosoever directly or indirectly attempts or assists in money laundering shall be guilty of offence under this Act.

title: Punishment for Penetrative Sexual Assault
description: Whoever commits penetrative sexual assault on a child shall be punished with imprisonment not less than 10 years which may extend to life.

title: Punishment for Sexual Harassment
description: Whoever commits sexual harassment upon a child shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Definitions
description: Civil contempt means willful disobedience of court judgment. Criminal contempt means publication scandalizing court.

title: Punishment for Fraud
description: Any person guilty of fraud shall be punished with imprisonment from 6 months to 10 years and fine up to 3 times the fraud amount.

title: Dishonour of Cheque
description: Dishonour of cheque for insufficiency of funds shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine up to twice cheque amount or both.
punishment: Up to 2 Years or Double Fine

title: Bribery at Elections
description: Giving or accepting gratification at elections shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine or both.

title: Interim Measures by Court
description: Court may grant interim measures for preservation of assets before during or after arbitral proceedings.

title: Courts to Try Suits
description: Courts shall have jurisdiction to try all suits of civil nature unless expressly or impliedly barred.

title: Bar of Limitation
description: Every suit appeal and application shall be dismissed if filed after prescribed period unless otherwise provided.

title: Admissibility of Electronic Records
description: Electronic records are admissible as evidence if certified in accordance with section 65B of the Act.

title: Execution of Wills
description: A will must be signed by testator in presence of two witnesses who must attest and subscribe the will.

title: Cases in Which Specific Performance Enforceable
description: Specific performance of contract may be enforced in certain cases where compensation in money would not be adequate relief.

title: Determination of Market Value
description: Market value of land shall be determined by Collector on date of notification using circle rates or average sale price.

title: Penalties
description: Whoever fails to comply with provisions shall be punished with imprisonment up to 5 years or fine up to 1 lakh or both.
punishment: Up to 5 Years or 1 Lakh Fine

title: Penalty for Breach of Protection Order
description: Whoever commits breach of protection order shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to 20000 or both.

title: Penalty for Giving or Taking Dowry
description: Giving or taking dowry shall be punished with imprisonment not less than 5 years and fine not less than 15000 rupees.

title: Internal Committee Action
description: Internal committee shall provide copy of inquiry report to employer and parties within 10 days of completion.

title: Prohibition on Disclosure of Identity
description: No report in newspaper magazine news-sheet shall disclose name address school or other particulars of a child in conflict with law.

title: Restriction on Sharing Information
description: Identity information collected shall not be used for purpose other than generation of Aadhaar numbers and authentication.
punishment: Up to 3 Years and 10 Lakh Fine

title: Appeals from Orders of Adjudicating Authority
description: Appeals from orders of NCLT shall lie to NCLAT and thereafter to Supreme Court.

title: Punishment for Certain Offences
description: Tax evasion above prescribed limits shall be punished with imprisonment and fine.
